---
author: ""
header-includes:
   - \usepackage{rotating}
   - \usepackage{float}
   - \usepackage{natbib}
   - \usepackage{booktabs}
   - \usepackage{multirow}
geometry: "left=1cm,right=1cm,top=0.9cm,bottom=1.2cm"
output: 
  pdf_document:
    citation_package: natbib
    keep_tex: true
    number_sections: true
#bibliography: ref.bib
link-citations: yes
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, results = 'asis', warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())
options(xtable.comment = FALSE)
library(reshape)
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(naniar)
library(scales)
library(tidyr)
library(xtable)
library(pracma)
library(this.path)
setwd(this.path::this.dir())

# joint and individual regression results
data <- readRDS("../../tmp/processed_signals/large/signal_combining_panel/regression_result.RDS")[, spec_idx := 9]
tmp <- readRDS("../../tmp/processed_signals/large/signal_combining_panel/regression_result_one_by_one.RDS")

# Let's order them
tt <- tmp[, .(var, first_ym)]
tt <- tt[order(first_ym)]
tt[, var_idx := 1:nrow(tt)]
tt[, first_ym := NULL]
data <- merge(data, tt, by = "var")
tmp <- merge(tmp, tt, by = "var")
tmp[, c("first_ym", "spec_var") := NULL]
tmp[, spec_idx := var_idx]
data <- rbind(data, tmp)
rm(tmp, tt)

# get variable labels
tmp <- readRDS("../../tmp/processed_signals/large/signal_availability.RDS")
tmp <- unique(tmp[, .(var, var_lab)])
data <- merge(data, tmp, by = "var")
rm(tmp)

# make more readable
data[, coef := 100 * coef]
data[, se := 100 * se]

# add stars
cuts <- abs(qnorm(c(.01, .05, .1) / 2))
data[, abs_tstat := abs(coef / se)]
data[, ss := ifelse(abs_tstat > cuts[1], 3, ifelse(abs_tstat > cuts[2], 2, ifelse(abs_tstat > cuts[3], 1, 0)))]
data[, coef_lab := paste0("$", sprintf("%.3f", coef))]
data[, ss_lab := sapply(data[, ss], function(x) {
  ifelse(x > 0,
    paste0("^{", strcat(rep("*", x)), "}$"),
    "$"
  )
})]
data[, coef_lab := paste0(coef_lab, ss_lab)]
data[, ss_lab := NULL]
data <- data[order(spec_idx, var_idx)]

est <- cast(data[, list(var_idx, spec_idx, coef_lab)], var_idx ~ spec_idx, value = "coef_lab") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(group_id = 100 * row_number(), type = "coef")
est[is.na(est)] <- ""

se <- cast(data[, list(var_idx, spec_idx, se)], var_idx ~ spec_idx, value = "se") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(group_id = 100 * row_number() + 1, type = "se") %>%
  dplyr::mutate_at(vars(2:10), ~ paste0("$(", sprintf("%.2f", round(., 2)), ")$"))
se[se == "$(NA)$"] <- ""

tbl <- bind_rows(est, se)
rm(est, se)
names(tbl)[1] <- "var_lab"

tt <- unique(data[, .(var_idx, var_lab)])[order(var_idx)]
tt <- tt[, var_lab]
tbl$var_lab <- c(tt, rep("", 8))

# note controls
ctrls <- data.table(
  var_lab = c("Time FE"),
  `1` = c("Y"), `2` = c("Y"),
  `3` = c("Y"), `4` = c("Y"),
  `5` = c("Y"), `6` = c("Y"),
  `7` = c("Y"), `8` = c("Y"),
  `9` = c("Y"),
  group_id = c(1001), type = ""
)
tbl <- bind_rows(tbl, ctrls)
rm(ctrls)

obs_and_r2 <- unique(data[, list(spec_idx, obs, r2 = war2)][order(spec_idx)]) %>%
  mutate(
    obs = comma(obs),
    r2 = paste0("$", sprintf("%.2f", 100 * r2), "\\%$")
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(., -spec_idx) %>%
  pivot_wider(name, names_from = "spec_idx", values_from = "value") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(name = replace(name, name == "r2", "Within $R^2$")) %>%
  mutate(name = replace(name, name == "obs", "Obs")) %>%
  dplyr::rename(var_lab = name) %>%
  mutate(group_id = c(1101, 1102), type = "")

tbl <- bind_rows(tbl, obs_and_r2) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(group_id) %>%
  mutate(var_lab = ifelse(type == "se", "", var_lab)) %>%
  mutate(type = NULL, group_id = NULL)
rm(obs_and_r2)

# add col columns
col_names <- data.table(t(as.data.frame(c("", paste0("(", 1:(ncol(tbl) - 1), ")")))))
names(col_names) <- names(tbl)
tbl <- bind_rows(col_names, tbl)
rm(col_names)

align_vactor <- paste0("ll", paste0(rep("c", times = ncol(tbl) - 1), collapse = ""))
x.side <- xtable(tbl, align = align_vactor)

print(x.side,
  type = "latex",
  table.placement = "!ht",
  include.rownames = FALSE,
  include.colnames = FALSE,
  tabular.environment = "tabular",
  caption.placement = NULL, # "top", NULL
  hline.after = NULL, # We don't need hline; we use booktabs
  floating = FALSE, # whether \begin{Table} should be created (TRUE) or not (FALSE)
  sanitize.text.function = force, # Important to treat content of first column as latex function
  add.to.row = list(
    pos = list(0, 0, 16, 17, nrow(tbl)),
    command = c(
      "\\toprule
                        \\multicolumn{10}{c}{Dependent variable: $r_{i,t+1}$ (in \\%)} \\\\\n \\hline",
      rep("\\vspace{5pt}", 3),
      "\\bottomrule \n"
    )
  )
)


print(x.side,
  type = "latex",
  table.placement = "!ht",
  include.rownames = FALSE,
  include.colnames = FALSE,
  tabular.environment = "tabular",
  caption.placement = NULL, # "top", NULL
  hline.after = NULL, # We don't need hline; we use booktabs
  floating = FALSE, # whether \begin{Table} should be created (TRUE) or not (FALSE)
  sanitize.text.function = force, # Important to treat content of first column as latex function
  add.to.row = list(
    pos = list(0, 0, 16, 17, nrow(tbl)),
    command = c(
      "\\toprule
                        \\multicolumn{10}{c}{Dependent variable: $r_{i,t+1}$ (in \\%)} \\\\\n \\hline",
      rep("\\vspace{5pt}", 3),
      "\\bottomrule \n"
    )
  ),
  file = "combining_predictors.tex"
)
```
